name: Cool Veggie Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread dough onto baking stone and use the pizza roller to press seams together.
2. Bake at 350°F until lightly browned.
3. Blend remaining ingredients and spread on cooled crust.
4. Top with three (or more) of the following: red/green pepper, mushrooms, tomato, broccoli, black olives.
Variations:
DESSERT PIZZA
1. Spread crust with cream cheese mixed with 1/3 cup sugar.
2. Top with any three (or more) of the following: strawberries, kiwi, grapes, blueberries, peaches, bananas.
STRAWBERRY PIZZA
1. Same as Dessert Pizza but substitute 1 cup powdered sugar for the granulated sugar.
2. Top with 1 pint cut, fresh strawberries.
3. Glaze with 1/4 cup powdered sugar mixed with 2 tablespoons milk.
